steps.title: Identify what the alterations prove
steps.content: The sentence says fragmentation inevitably [BLANK] alterations to ecological processes. The next clause emphasizes that these changes will impact specialist species more than generalists. For alterations to have real impacts on species, they must be significant and present—not prevented or weakened. The word must mean creates or produces.

steps.title: Apply the meaning to find the answer
steps.content: Engenders means produces or gives rise to, which expresses the required meaning: fragmentation produces alterations that impact specialist species more than generalists. Attenuates (weakens), preempts (prevents), and subsumes (absorbs or includes) don't match the required meaning. That matches choice A — A is correct.
